positive: A symmetrical and intricately detailed central arrangement of bioluminescent flora and fauna, featuring stylized glow-worm mushrooms, geometric fern fronds, and delicate celestial moths. The overall composition is set against a deep midnight blue background, accented with iridescent teals, muted gold leaf, and starry bokeh effects. The aesthetic is high-contrast neo-whimsical botanical illustration, evoking the style of vintage scientific etchings mixed with modern celestial art. The design must maximize clean, strong silhouettes and central focus, perfect for seamless placement on apparel. Minimal visual noise, maximal illustrative detail.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, signature, watermark, logo, cropped, noise, poor detail, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, cartoon, simple background
